Bratz (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,010,209Details
International Box Office $16,075,206
Worldwide Box Office $26,085,415
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $39,871,775
Total $39,871,775

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$4,208,455 (42.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:1,509 opening theaters/1,509 max. theaters, 3.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $17,401,465

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 3rd, 2007 (Wide) by Lionsgate
Video Release: November 27th, 2007 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment, released as Bratz - The Movie
MPA Rating: PG for thematic elements
Running Time: 110 minutes
Franchise: Bratz
Plot point: High School Hell, New Guy/Girl in School
Social setting: High School
Source material: Toy Adaptations
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Based on Toy
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
